examples: The pons the cerebellum and the medulla oblong ata composed the hindbrain.
The pons, the cerebellum and the medulla oblongata composed the hindbrain.
Something tickled my hindbrain then, and I had to bite my lip to keep from laughing.
Another common problem for children with spina bifida is called hindbrain herniation in which part of the brain and brainstem slip into the spinal column.
